examples: I get paid every other week.

definitions.text: An other, another (person, etc), more often rendered as another.
examples: I'm afraid little Robbie does not always play well with others.

definitions.text: The other one; the second of two.
examples: One boat is not better than the other.
Why not tell one or other of your parents?

definitions.text: Not the one or ones previously referred to.
examples: Earning less than $2,000 a month, I have no other source of income except for gifts from relatives.

definitions.text: To regard, label, or treat as an "other", as not part of the same group; to view as different and alien.
To treat as different or separate; segregate; ostracise.
